zh.lifeSummary: 當Joane Ellis於1526年出生在英國越可爾希 梅爾敦時，她的父親Sir John Ellis23歲，母親Belinda Masterson23歲。她於1543年11月20日與Robert Wilson在英國越可爾希 梅爾敦結婚。他們至少是4個兒子的父母。她去世於1581年1月5日在英國享年55歲，埋葬在英國越可爾米費爾德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Joane Ellis于1526年出生在英国越可爾希 梅爾敦时，她的父亲Sir John Ellis23岁，母亲Belinda Masterson23岁。她于1543年11月20日与Robert Wilson在英国越可爾希 梅爾敦结婚。他们至少是4个儿子的父母。她去世于1581年1月5日在英国享年55岁，埋葬在英国越可爾米費爾德。

nameMeanings.name: Ellis
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from the Middle English personal name Elis, an Old French vernacular form of Elias, the Latin and New Testament Greek form of Hebrew Eliyahu; see Elijah and compare Elias , Lias , Ely .
English: possibly in some instances from the Middle English female personal name Elice, a pet form of Elizabeth .

Welsh: from Elis, a shortened form of the Welsh personal name Elisse (earlier Elisedd, a derivative of elus ‘kindly, benevolent’). As usual in Welsh, the stress in Elisse is on the penultimate syllable -li-, which shifts to initial El- when the name is shortened to Elis. It later became confused with Ellis in 1 above.

variants.name: Ellison
meanings: English: from the Middle English personal name Ellis (Old Testament Elijah) + -son.
English: from the Middle English, Old French female personal name Elissent, Elisant, ancient Germanic Elisind.

Scottish: sometimes a post-medieval variant of Allison , which is mainly concentrated in northern England and southwestern Scotland. There is a similar Scottish variation between Alison and Elison as female personal names.

variants.name: Ely
meanings: English: habitational name from Ely, a cathedral city on an island in the fens north of Cambridge, so named from Old English ǣl ‘eel’ + gē ‘district’.
English, French, and Breton (Finistère): from the Middle English, Old French personal name Elie, Hely (Elijah in the King James Bible); see Ellis and Elias .
English: variant of   Healey  .

variants.name: Eales
meanings: English: perhaps a variant of Ellis , or, alternatively, a variant of Ell , with genitival or post-medieval excrescent -s. In Devon the name may also be a variant of Heales, with loss of initial H-, itself a variant of Heal or Heel, with post-medieval excrescent -s, or a variant of Hales .

variants.name: Elcock
meanings: English: from the Middle English personal name (H)elecoc, commonly a pet form of (H)elie, itself a pet form of Ellis (from Latin Elias), but sometimes also a Middle English pet form of the female name Ellen + the hypocoristic suffix -cok.

variants.name: Elliott
meanings: English: from the Middle English, Old French personal name Eliot, a pet form of the Old Testament name Elijah, rendered in Greek as Ēlias and in Old French as Élie + the diminutive suffix -ot; compare Ellis . The name Aylett may in some cases also have been confused with or absorbed into Elliott.
Scottish: late variant of   Elwood  .

Scottish (of Breton origin): perhaps, as some members of the Elliott clan believe, a Scottish variant of the Breton surname Elleouet, a habitational name from one of the hamlets named Allegot in Finistère.

variants.name: Bellis
meanings: Welsh: Anglicized form of Welsh ap Elisedd ‘son of Elisedd’ (see Ellis ).

English: possibly also a nickname from bellis, the regular form of bellows until the 16th century (see Bellows ). The form bellis persisted generally until the 16th century and much later in various dialects.

Italian: patronymic from the personal name Bello . It is formed with the Latin ablative plural suffix -is imparting the broader sense ‘belonging to, of’, in this case ‘member of the Belli family’ (compare Belli ). Compare also De Bellis .

variants.name: Elles
meanings: English: variant either of   Ellis   or   Ells  .
Dutch and German: variant of   Ellens  .

variants.name: Elijah
meanings: Welsh, Jewish, and African American: from the personal name Elijah, the usual English transliteration in the King James Bible of the Hebrew name Eliyahu ‘Jehovah is God’, the name of an Old Testament prophet (compare Elias , Ellis ). As a Welsh surname, this is a comparatively late adoption of the personal name, adopted after Old Testament personal names became popular among Nonconformists.

variants.name: Ells
meanings: English (London and Kent): variant of Ellis , or a variant of Ell , with genitival or post-medieval excrescent -s.

nameMeanings.name: Joane
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Old French Jo(h)anne, and so a doublet of Joan . This too was revived as a given name in its own right in the first half of the 20th century. It has to some extent been influenced by the independently formed combination Jo Anne.

variants.name: Johanne
meanings: and Norwegian feminine form of   Johan .

variants.name: Joann
meanings: From Old French Jo(h)anne, and so a doublet of Joan . This too was revived as a given name in its own right in the first half of the 20th century. It has to some extent been influenced by the independently formed combination Jo Anne.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

en.lifeSummary: When Joane Ellis was born in 1526, in High Melton, Yorkshire, England, her father, Sir John Ellis, was 23 and her mother, Belinda Masterson, was 23. She married Robert Wilson on 20 November 1543, in High Melton, Yorkshire, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons. She died on 5 January 1581, in England, at the age of 55, and was buried in Mirfield, Yorkshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Joane Ellis est née en 1526, à High Melton, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Sir John Ellis, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Belinda Masterson, avait 23 ans. Elle a épousé Robert Wilson le 20 novembre 1543, à High Melton, Everwyck, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils. Elle est décédée le 5 janvier 1581, à Angleterre, à l’âge de 55 ans, et a été enterrée à Mirfield, Everwyck, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Joane Ellis 1526 in High Melton, Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir John Ellis 23 und ihre Mutter Belinda Masterson 23. Sie hat am 20. November 1543 in High Melton, Yorkshire, England Robert Wilson geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne. Sie starb am 5. Januar 1581 im Alter von 55 Jahren in England und wurde in Mirfield, Yorkshire, England begraben.

ja.lifeSummary: Joane Ellisが1526年にイギリスヨークシュアイアヒグ メルトンで生まれた時，父Sir John Ellisは23歳，母Belinda Mastersonは23歳であった。1543年11月20日にイギリスヨークシュアイアヒグ メルトンでRobert Wilsonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子の親であった。彼女は1581年1月5日にイギリスで55歳で死去し，イギリスヨークシュアイアミルフィールドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Joane Ellis(이)가 1526년 영국 요르크실르 히그h 멜턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir John Ellis(은)는 23세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Belinda Masterson(은)는 23세였다. 그녀는 1543년 11월 20일 영국 요르크실르 히그h 멜턴에서 Robert Wilson(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1581년 1월 5일 영국에서 55세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 요르크실르 미르필드에 묻혔다.

Ela casou-se com Robert Wilson em 20 de novembro de 1543, em High Melton, Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joane Ellis родилась в 1526 г. в местности хаи мелтон, еркшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir John Ellis было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Belinda Masterson, 23. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Robert Wilson 20 ноября 1543 г. в местности хаи мелтон, еркшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына. Она умерла 5 января 1581 г. в местности Англия в возрасте 55 лет и была похоронена в местности мирфиелд, еркшир, Англия.
